calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Recorded by For the Record (9:07am-9:35am) (514)
Judge Tong made election disclosure.
Kevin A. Calia, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jawed Karim Investments, LLC. Both appeared via Zoom.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Emmanuel Bamfo.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness: Jawed Karim sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $150,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $1640.72
Total Judgment in the amount of $151,640.72
Judgment signed in open court.
